_publications._publicationTitle: C-Fiber Loss as a Possible Cause of Neuropathic Pain in Schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: Schwannomatosis patients showed lower values in all scales of the SF-36 health survey compared to normative data and to the control group indicating a relevant impact on quality of life.
details: Schwannomatosis patients showed lower values in all scales compared to normative data and control group, indicating relevant impact on quality of life.
